rationale: Review 2 correctly identifies that `@[simp]` on `includeRight_apply` (proved by `rfl`) causes simp to eagerly unfold `includeRight` before the four characteristic lemmas (`counit_includeRight`, `comul_includeRight`, `antipode_includeRight`, `map_includeRight`) can fire, making them dead simp lemmas — a genuine API design defect confirmed against the diff. Review 1 misses this entirely; acting on it leaves the broken simp set in place.
